_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: PDLIM2 expression was significantly knocked down in schwannomas cells as confirmed by Western blot
details: Successfully achieved significant PDLIM2 knockdown in three primary schwannoma and three primary meningioma cell populations, confirmed by Western blot
